title: Let’s Celebrate the 2025 Marketing Champions
author: Guilda Hilaire

classification.rationale: Rule-based: learning intent detected in 'Introduction'. Products: sales_cloud. Funnel: awareness.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Introduction — let the reader engage with the content before presenting a CTA.

classification.rationale: Rule-based: problem_solving intent detected in 'What makes a Marketing Champion?'. Products: sales_cloud, marketing_cloud. Funnel: consideration.

existing_cta.heading: Want to become a Marketing Champion?
existing_cta.body: Calling all #MomentMarketers, social savants, and campaign captains — take your career to the next level by applying for Salesforce’s Marketing Champions program.

existing_cta_score.rationale: CTA targets consideration-stage readers; section is consideration-stage. Product alignment: match.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Narrative section — CTA not needed here. Effective CTAs are placed after value delivery, not during.

section_analyses.section_heading: How can I connect with the Marketing Champions?

classification.rationale: Rule-based: learning intent detected in 'How can I connect with the Marketing Champions?'. Products: sales_cloud, marketing_cloud. Funnel: awareness.

existing_cta.heading: Ready to take the next step?
existing_cta.body: Join our Marketing Cloud Trailblazer Community today, and you can connect with fellow marketing professionals, share your thoughts, and grow your career.

existing_cta_score.rationale: CTA targets awareness-stage readers; section is awareness-stage. Product alignment: match.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Short narrative section — CTA would interrupt the reading flow.

cta_health_issues: CTAs in 67% of sections. Consider reducing to 1 per 3-4 sections.
